nodes.name: Webhook: New Lead Alert
nodes.notes: SETUP: Fire this webhook from your lead capture workflow (ME-02) or any form. POST { event_type: 'new_lead', name, email, source, details }

nodes.name: Webhook: Payment Received
nodes.notes: POST { event_type: 'payment_received', customer_name, amount, currency, product }

nodes.name: Webhook: Chatbot Escalation
nodes.notes: POST { event_type: 'chatbot_escalation', customer_name, email, message, session_id }

nodes.name: Webhook: Invoice Overdue
nodes.notes: POST { event_type: 'invoice_overdue', client_name, invoice_id, amount, days_overdue }

nodes.name: Format Alert Message
nodes.notes: Formats all incoming alerts into clean, emoji-rich Telegram messages.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Alert
nodes.notes:
SETUP:
1. Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather → get the API token
2. Start a chat with your bot and send /start
3. Get your chat ID: https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates
4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with your chat ID (e.g. 123456789)
5. Add credentials in n8n: Settings → Credentials → Telegram API

nodes.name: Log Alert to Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Alert_Log' with columns: Timestamp | Event_Type | Message_Preview

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily Digest 6pm
nodes.notes: Fires at 6pm every day. Adjust timezone in n8n Settings → General.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors. If Telegram fails, check bot token and chat ID.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

THIS WORKFLOW PROVIDES:
  5 Webhook endpoints (one per alert type)
  Real-time Telegram messages
  Daily 6pm digest summary
  Alert log in Google Sheets

TELEGRAM SETUP:
1. Message @BotFather on Telegram → /newbot → follow steps → copy the API token
2. Start a chat with your new bot
3. Get your chat ID:
   a) Send a message to your bot
   b) Visit: https://api.telegram.org/bot<YOUR_TOKEN>/getUpdates
   c) Find 'chat' → 'id' in the response
4. In n8n: Settings → Credentials → New → Telegram API → paste token
5. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with your chat ID
6. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TELEGRAM_CREDENTIAL_ID with the n8n credential ID

WEBHOOK ENDPOINTS (copy from n8n after activating):
  /alert-new-lead          → Call from lead capture workflows
  /alert-payment           → Call from payment/Stripe webhooks
  /alert-escalation        → Call from chatbot workflow (ME-04)
  /alert-invoice-overdue   → Call from invoice workflow (ME-03)
  /alert-workflow-error    → Call from any workflow's error handler

INTEGRATION EXAMPLE (from ME-03 Invoice Reminder):
  Add an HTTP Request node after overdue detection:
  POST to /alert-invoice-overdue with body:
  { event_type: 'invoice_overdue', client_name: ..., invoice_id: ..., amount: ..., days_overdue: ... }

GOOGLE SHEETS TAB 'Alert_Log':
  Timestamp | Event_Type | Message_Preview

WHATSAPP ALTERNATIVE:
  Replace the Telegram nodes with WhatsApp Business API via Twilio:
  - Use n8n-nodes-base.twilio node
  - Set toNumber: whatsapp:+REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_WHATSAPP_NUMBER
  - Requires a Twilio account with WhatsApp Business API access
